SEARCH
Package com.dropbox.core.v2.files

Class LookupError

java.lang.Object
com.dropbox.core.v2.files.LookupError
public final class LookupError extends Object
This class is an open tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isAbc() methods will return true. You can use tag() to determine the tag associated with this instance.

Open unions may be extended in the future with additional tags. If a new tag is introduced that this SDK does not recognized, the OTHER value will be used.

    For internal use only.

    LookupError.Tag
    Discriminating tag type for LookupError.

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final LookupError
    LOCKED
    The given path is locked.
    static final LookupError
    NOT_FILE
    We were expecting a file, but the given path refers to something that isn't a file.
    static final LookupError
    NOT_FOLDER
    We were expecting a folder, but the given path refers to something that isn't a folder.
    static final LookupError
    NOT_FOUND
    There is nothing at the given path.
    static final LookupError
    OTHER
    Catch-all used for unknown tag values returned by the Dropbox servers.
    static final LookupError
    RESTRICTED_CONTENT
    The file cannot be transferred because the content is restricted.
    static final LookupError
    UNSUPPORTED_CONTENT_TYPE
    This operation is not supported for this content type.

  • Field Details

    • NOT_FOUND

      public static final LookupError NOT_FOUND
      There is nothing at the given path.

    • NOT_FILE

      public static final LookupError NOT_FILE
      We were expecting a file, but the given path refers to something that isn't a file.

    • NOT_FOLDER

      public static final LookupError NOT_FOLDER
      We were expecting a folder, but the given path refers to something that isn't a folder.

    • RESTRICTED_CONTENT

      public static final LookupError RESTRICTED_CONTENT
      The file cannot be transferred because the content is restricted. For example, we might restrict a file due to legal requirements.

    • UNSUPPORTED_CONTENT_TYPE

      public static final LookupError UNSUPPORTED_CONTENT_TYPE
      This operation is not supported for this content type.

    • LOCKED

      public static final LookupError LOCKED
      The given path is locked.

    • OTHER

      public static final LookupError OTHER
      Catch-all used for unknown tag values returned by the Dropbox servers.

      Receiving a catch-all value typically indicates this SDK version is not up to date. Consider updating your SDK version to handle the new tags.

  • Method Details

    • tag

      public LookupError.Tag tag()
      Returns the tag for this instance.

      This class is a tagged union. Tagged unions instances are always associated to a specific tag. This means only one of the isXyz() methods will return true. Callers are recommended to use the tag value in a switch statement to properly handle the different values for this LookupError.

      If a tag returned by the server is unrecognized by this SDK, the LookupError.Tag.OTHER value will be used.

      Returns:
      the tag for this instance.

    • isMalformedPath

      public boolean isMalformedPath()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag LookupError.Tag.MALFORMED_PATH, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as LookupError.Tag.MALFORMED_PATH, false otherwise.

    • malformedPath

      public static LookupError malformedPath(String value)
      Returns an instance of LookupError that has its tag set to LookupError.Tag.MALFORMED_PATH.

      The given path does not satisfy the required path format. Please refer to the Path formats documentation for more information.

      Parameters:
      value - value to assign to this instance.
      Returns:
      Instance of LookupError with its tag set to LookupError.Tag.MALFORMED_PATH.

    • malformedPath

      public static LookupError malformedPath()
      Returns an instance of LookupError that has its tag set to LookupError.Tag.MALFORMED_PATH.

      The given path does not satisfy the required path format. Please refer to the Path formats documentation for more information.

      Returns:
      Instance of LookupError with its tag set to LookupError.Tag.MALFORMED_PATH.

    • getMalformedPathValue

      public String getMalformedPathValue()
      The given path does not satisfy the required path format. Please refer to the Path formats documentation for more information.

      This instance must be tagged as LookupError.Tag.MALFORMED_PATH.

      Returns:
      The String value associated with this instance if isMalformedPath() is true.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - If isMalformedPath() is false.

    • isNotFound

      public boolean isNotFound()
      Returns true if this instance has the tag LookupError.Tag.NOT_FOUND, false otherwise.
      Returns:
      true if this instance is tagged as LookupError.Tag.NOT_FOUND, false otherwise.
